Quick actions

Useful tools

Move around

  • “Scroll down”
  • “Next heading”
  • “Read title”

Take action

  • “Click login”
  • “Open first link”
  • “Read focused”

Ask freely

  • “Summarize this page”
  • “Open example dot com”
  • “What is photosynthesis?”

Keyboard

Chrome shortcuts

Keyboard shortcuts are configured in Chrome → Extensions → Keyboard shortcuts.
